message.content:
If you’re looking for **radiofrequency microneedling in Katy, TX**, several local med spas and clinics offer it, including **Ageless MedSpa**, **About Face & Body**, **Glow Up MD Spa**, **H-Town Aesthetics**, and **Kristin Schmidt MD / Vivace**.[1][2][3][4][8]

Here’s a quick comparison of the options surfaced in the search results:

| Provider | Treatment name | Notable details |
|---|---|---|
| Ageless MedSpa | RF Microneedling | Describes the treatment as minimally invasive, with minimal downtime and suitability for all skin types.[1] |
| About Face & Body | PiXel8 RF Microneedling | Says it can be customized for concerns like wrinkles, under-eye bags, pigmentation, double chin, and skin laxity; recovery may include brief redness and swelling.[2] |
| Glow Up MD Spa | RF Microneedling | Says it treats acne scars, fine lines, hyperpigmentation, enlarged pores, and skin laxity; notes typical use of topical numbing and 3–4 sessions spaced 4–6 weeks apart.[3] |
| H-Town Aesthetics | Secret RF Microneedling | Lists pricing for face, face & neck, scars, and abdomen stretch marks.[4] |
| Kristin Schmidt MD | Vivace RF microneedling | Notes use of topical anesthetic, FDA-cleared Vivace device, and treatment for light to dark skin types.[8] |

Most of these providers describe RF microneedling as a **minimally invasive skin-rejuvenation treatment** that combines microneedling with radiofrequency energy to stimulate collagen and improve texture, firmness, and fine lines.[1][2][3][6][8]

If you want, I can also help you narrow this down by **price**, **best for acne scars**, **best for skin tightening**, or **which clinic is closest to a specific Katy neighborhood**.
